phase: Phase R0-G1 Governance Gate UI Polish
notes: The post-gate Matrix UI was reframed as an institutional AHIN Governance Matrix while preserving Five Elements identity.
Treasury funding, protocol execution, LIFE++ transfer, burn, signing, and transaction submission remain disabled.
Several local Node/Next/tsx validation commands timed out without emitting diagnostics in the current runtime environment.
The audit finding is the existing bigint-buffer chain through @sqds/multisig and was not introduced by this UI polish patch.
A local dev-server visual smoke attempt was blocked because next dev did not become reachable on localhost before it was stopped.
